info.title: Value Fabric - Layer 1: Intelligent Data Ingestion

get.description: Legacy-compatible health check with dependency status.

post.description:
Seed deterministic Layer 1 job evidence for backend-integrated validation.

This endpoint is non-production only, service-auth gated, and writes
tenant-scoped Layer 1 records through the canonical persistence models.
It exists to prove the live frontend can read real Layer 1 job state
without requiring external crawling or mocks during Playwright validation.

schema.title: Response Seed Validation Ingestion Job Api V1 Ingestion Validation Seed Job Post

get.description: List all scraping targets for the organization.

Get aggregated statistics for all scraping targets.

Computes counts by derived connection status and average health score
server-side to avoid transferring large target lists to the client.
Get detailed information about a specific target.

parameters.name: force

schema.description: Hard delete if no jobs exist
schema.title: Force

parameters.description: Hard delete if no jobs exist

post.description: Trigger immediate execution of a target.

get.description:
Get recent crawl decisions for a target's jobs.

Returns the most recent crawl decisions across all jobs
for this target, showing routing choices and outcomes.

schema.title: Response Get Target Decisions Api V1 Ingestion Targets  Target Id  Decisions Get

get.description:
Get routing quality report for a specific job.

Provides metrics on routing accuracy, fallback rates,
and performance characteristics for analysis.

Get fallback statistics for a specific domain.

Shows how often the router falls back to browser for this
domain, helping identify SPA-heavy sites or routing issues.
List all scraping jobs with filtering and pagination.
Get detailed job information including execution stages.

delete.description: Cancel a running or queued job.

get.description: Get extracted data results for a job.

post.description: Retry a failed or partially successful job.

Execute batch operations on ingestion jobs and targets.

Supports three operations:
- execute: Trigger crawl jobs for multiple targets
- cancel: Cancel multiple running/queued jobs
- retry: Retry multiple failed jobs

Returns per-item results with success/failure status.
Trigger content cleanup for old data.

RequestContext.title: RequestContext
RequestContext.description:
Identity context carried by a single request.

``RequestContext`` is deliberately shared by L1-L5 governance code.  It
preserves tenant scoping and trace propagation while supporting legacy
callers that still pass ``source`` and newer middleware that passes the
explicit ``auth_source`` field.
